BUSINESS HOURS

Mon–Sat: 8AM–7PM

Sun: 9AM–5PM (24/7 emergency standby)

Active Emergency Support
THE METHOD

How We Structure Your Advisory

Our consultations are structured around risk-management and budget optimization. We evaluate your load criteria, review component requirements, and draw up installation schedules.

01

System Load Analysis

We outline the aggregate kilowatt draws, phase balance requirements, and protection thresholds.

02

Compliance Mapping

Ensuring that spacing, earthing layout, and breaker sizes match KEB standards.

Request Consultation

Enter your project specifications below. Our engineers will prepare diagnostic drafts.

Name is required.

Please enter a valid 10-digit number.

Submitting gathers details and opens WhatsApp Web / Mobile to send directly.

COVERAGE MATRIX

Active Kerala Coverage

From our central engineering workshop in Chungathara, we operate active technical dispatch teams across neighboring zones, ensuring code compliance and fast service SLAs.

Chungathara & Nilambur Immediate local dispatch
Malappuram District < 2 Hour response SLA
Kozhikode & Wayanad Scheduled site visits
Palakkad & Thrissur Commercial projects only

Response Threshold SLAs

Emergency Call-Out < 2 Hour Response SLA
Scheduled Audits Next-Business-Day Booking
Industrial Installations Within 3-5 Business Days
OUR PRINCIPLES

Why Contractors Trust Us

01

Licensed KEB Engineers

All installations are planned and signed off by certified engineering professionals in compliance with Kerala state laws.

02

Transparent Project Bidding

Detailed line-item quotes with clear pricing for materials, panel assembly, wiring layouts, and diagnostic testing.

03

Premium Brand Alignment

Authorized deployment of top-tier switchgear and components from Siemens, Schneider, and ABB.

Bright Electrical

& Engineering Works

Kerala's trusted electrical engineering partner. Licensed, certified, and committed to quality across residential, commercial, and industrial projects.
